title: US dollar crisis — rapid devaluation and reserve currency doubt
historical_analogue: 1971 Nixon shock, 1985 Plaza Accord, 2011 debt ceiling crisis
description: A crisis of confidence in the US dollar following a debt ceiling standoff and credit rating downgrade. The dollar weakens 15% vs the Euro in 6 months. Oil and commodities priced in dollars spike. Import inflation hits US consumers hard.
